sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, info XML, value INT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, info, value, created_at) VALUES (1, '<data><item>10</item><item>20</item></data>', 100, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, info, value, created_at) VALUES (2, '<data><item>30</item><item>40</item></data>', NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, info, value, created_at) VALUES (3, '<data></data>', 200, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, info, value, created_at) VALUES (4, '<data><item>NaN</item></data>', 300, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_AGG(xpath_split(info, '/data/item')) AS items FROM test_data GROUP BY value HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT value, DB.DBA.BAG_AGG(xpath_split(info, '/data/item')) AS items FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY value ORDER BY value;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_AGG(xpath_split(info, '/data/item')) AS items FROM (SELECT x.id, xpath_split(x.info, '/data/item') AS item FROM test_data x WHERE x.value < 150) AS subquery GROUP BY item;
SELECT id, DB.DBA.BAG_AGG(xpath_split(info, '/data/item')) AS items FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING MIN(value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, DB.DBA.BAG_AGG(xpath_split(info, '/data/item')) AS items FROM test_data WHERE value IS NULL OR created_at > '2023-01-01' GROUP BY value ORDER BY NULLIF(value, 0) DESC;
